015 */
016package org.consensusj.exchange.knowm;
017
018import io.reactivex.rxjava3.annotations.NonNull;
019import io.reactivex.rxjava3.core.Observable;
020import io.reactivex.rxjava3.core.Observer;
021import org.consensusj.exchange.CurrencyUnitPair;
022import org.consensusj.exchange.rx.ExchangeRateUpdate;
023import org.consensusj.exchange.rx.PolledObservablePair;
024import org.consensusj.exchange.rx.ReactiveExchange;
025import org.javamoney.moneta.spi.DefaultNumberValue;
026import org.knowm.xchange.Exchange;
027import org.knowm.xchange.ExchangeFactory;
028import org.knowm.xchange.ExchangeSpecification;
029import org.knowm.xchange.currency.CurrencyPair;
030import org.knowm.xchange.dto.marketdata.Ticker;
031import org.knowm.xchange.service.marketdata.MarketDataService;
032import org.slf4j.Logger;
033import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;
034
035import javax.money.CurrencyUnit;
036import javax.money.convert.ProviderContext;
037import javax.money.convert.RateType;
038import java.io.IOException;
039import java.util.Collection;
040import java.util.Date;
041import java.util.HashMap;
042import java.util.Map;
043import java.util.function.Supplier;
044
045/**
046 *
047 */
048public class ReactiveKnowmExchangeProvider implements ReactiveExchange {
049    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(ReactiveKnowmExchangeProvider.class);
050    protected final String exchangeClassName;
051    protected final Map<CurrencyUnit, String> tickerSymbolConversions;
052    protected final Observable<Long> interval;
053    protected final ExchangeSpecification exchangeSpecification;
054    
055    protected final Map<CurrencyUnitPair, MonitoredCurrency> observablePairs = new HashMap<>();
056
057    protected String name;
058    protected ProviderContext providerContext;
059    protected MarketDataService marketDataService;
060
061    private volatile boolean initialized = false;
062    protected Exchange exchange;
063
064    public ReactiveKnowmExchangeProvider(String exchangeClassName,
065                                         Map<CurrencyUnit, String> tickerSymbolConversions,
066                                         Collection<CurrencyUnitPair> pairs,
067                                         Observable<Long> interval) {
068        this(null, exchangeClassName, tickerSymbolConversions, pairs, interval);
069    }
070
071    public ReactiveKnowmExchangeProvider(ExchangeSpecification exchangeSpecification,
072                                         Map<CurrencyUnit, String> tickerSymbolConversions,
073                                         Collection<CurrencyUnitPair> pairs,
074                                         Observable<Long> interval) {
075        this(exchangeSpecification, null, tickerSymbolConversions, pairs, interval);
076    }
077
078    public ReactiveKnowmExchangeProvider(ExchangeSpecification exchangeSpecification,
079                                          String exchangeClassName,
080                                          Map<CurrencyUnit, String> tickerSymbolConversions,
081                                          Collection<CurrencyUnitPair> pairs,
082                                          Observable<Long> interval) {
083        this.exchangeSpecification = exchangeSpecification;
084        if (exchangeSpecification != null) {
085            this.exchangeClassName = exchangeSpecification.getExchangeClassName();
086        } else {
087            this.exchangeClassName = exchangeClassName;
088        }
089        this.tickerSymbolConversions = (tickerSymbolConversions != null) ? tickerSymbolConversions : Map.of();
090        this.interval = interval;
091        for (CurrencyUnitPair pair : pairs) {
092            MonitoredCurrency observablePair = new MonitoredCurrency(pair, xchangePair(pair));
093            observablePairs.put(pair, observablePair);
094        }
095    }
096    
097    private synchronized void initialize()  {
098        if (!initialized) {
099            log.info("initializing, calling createExchange()");
100            // createExchange w/o exchangeSpecification does a remote initialization that takes approximately 1.5 seconds
101            if (exchangeSpecification != null) {
102                exchange = ExchangeFactory.INSTANCE.createExchange(exchangeSpecification);
103            } else {
104                exchange = ExchangeFactory.INSTANCE.createExchange(exchangeClassName);
105            }
106            log.info("initializing, getting name");
107            name = exchange.getExchangeSpecification().getExchangeName();
108            providerContext = ProviderContext.of(name, RateType.DEFERRED);
109            marketDataService = exchange.getMarketDataService();
110            initialized = true;
111            log.info("initialized");
112        }
113        log.info("exiting");
114    }
115
116    @Override
117    public String getName() {
118        return name;
119    }
120
121    @Override
122    public PolledObservablePair getObservablePair(CurrencyUnitPair pair) {
123        return observablePairs.get(pair).observable;
124    }
125
126    protected class MonitoredCurrency {
127        final public CurrencyUnitPair  pair;        // Terminating (target) JavaMoney CurrencyUnit
128        final public CurrencyPair exchangePair;     // XChange currency pair (format used by XChange/exchange)
129        final public PolledObservablePair observable;
130        
131        MonitoredCurrency(CurrencyUnitPair pair, CurrencyPair exchangePair) {
132            this.pair = pair;
133            this.exchangePair = exchangePair;
134            observable = new KnowmObservablePair(pair, this::pollingFunction, interval);
135        }
136
137        public ExchangeRateUpdate pollingFunction() {
138            Ticker ticker = pollForTicker();
139            return tickerMapper(ticker);
140        }
141
142        public Ticker pollForTicker() {
143            try {
144                return marketDataService.getTicker(exchangePair);
145            } catch (IOException e) {
146                throw new RuntimeException(e);
147            }
148        }
149
150        public ExchangeRateUpdate tickerMapper(Ticker ticker) {
151            Date timestamp = ticker.getTimestamp();
152            long time = (timestamp != null) ? timestamp.getTime() : 0;
153            return new ExchangeRateUpdate(pair,
154                    DefaultNumberValue.of(ticker.getBid()),
155                    time);
156        }
157    }
158
159    /**
160     * Subclass PolledObservablePair to lazy initialize exchange on subscribe
161     */
162    private class KnowmObservablePair extends PolledObservablePair {
163
164        /**
165         * @param pair         The currency pair to observe
166         * @param rateSupplier A polling Supplier function (for a single pair)
167         * @param interval     An interval (or equivalent) to provide clock ticks to trigger polling
168         */
169        private KnowmObservablePair(CurrencyUnitPair pair, Supplier<ExchangeRateUpdate> rateSupplier, Observable<Long> interval) {
170            super(pair, rateSupplier, interval);
171        }
172
173
174        @Override
175        protected void subscribeActual(@NonNull Observer<? super ExchangeRateUpdate> observer) {
176            initialize();
177            super.subscribeActual(observer);
178        }
179    }
180
181
182    /**
183     * Map from CurrencyUnitPair to XChange CurrencyPair
184     * tickerSymbolConversions is used to handle cases like ItBit that uses "XBT" instead of "BTC"
185     * @param pair  CurrencyUnitPair using JavaMoney CurrencyUnits
186     * @return  XChange CurrencyPair with exchange-specific symbols if any
187     */
188    protected CurrencyPair xchangePair(CurrencyUnitPair pair) {
189        return new CurrencyPair(convertSymbol(pair.getBase()),
190                convertSymbol(pair.getTarget()));
191    }
192
193    /**
194     * Convert a JavaMoney CurrencyUnit to an XChange currency code string
195     * (This will be exchange-specific (e.g. ItBit uses "XBT" instead of "BTC")
196     * @param currencyUnit A JavaMoney currency unit
197     * @return exchange-specific symbol for the currency
198     */
199    public String convertSymbol(CurrencyUnit currencyUnit) {
200        return tickerSymbolConversions.getOrDefault(currencyUnit, currencyUnit.getCurrencyCode());
201    }
202
203}
